title: Crispy Korean Smoked Haddock Skillet
description: A crispy and grassy one-pot Korean dish featuring smoked haddock, spherified for a unique texture, and is keto-friendly
instructions: Heat the sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant
Add the smoked haddock and cook for 3-4 minutes until crispy and golden brown
In a small bowl, whisk together the gochujang and soy sauce
Pour the gochujang mixture over the smoked haddock and stir to combine
Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds and chopped green onions over the top
Using a syringe or spoon, drop small amounts of the xanthan gum mixture into the skillet to create spheres
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the spheres are set
Serve the crispy smoked haddock skillet hot, garnished with additional green onions and sesame seeds if desired
